title: Chicken, Greens & Gravy
steps: Season the chicken (onion powder, oregano, salt, pepper) and brown in oil on high heat ~8 min. Keep the browned bits in the pan.
Lower the heat, sprinkle the flour over the chicken and stir 1 min to cook it out.
Pour in the water a splash at a time, stirring, until you have a smooth gravy. Simmer 3–4 min to thicken.
Stir in the green veg to heat through. Serve over the carb (cooked fresh). Eat 2 days from the fridge, or freeze a portion.

title: Chicken in Mushroom Sauce
steps: Season and brown the chicken in oil; set aside.
Make the mushroom sauce in the same pan (recipe below) so it picks up the browned bits.
Return the chicken, add the green veg, simmer to combine.
Serve over the carb (cooked fresh). Eat 2 days, or freeze.

title: Fresh Chicken Tortillas

ingredients.item: Fresh veg: cabbage, cucumber, tomato, corn
Smoked paprika, oregano, onion powder, salt

steps: Season chicken pieces (smoked paprika, oregano, a little onion powder, salt) and brown in a pan; cool a little.
Make the yoghurt sauce (recipe below) and chop the fresh veg.
Warm a tortilla, fill with chicken, cabbage, cucumber, tomato, corn (and cheese if you like), spoon over yoghurt sauce and roll. No baking — assemble fresh each time.
Keep the cooked chicken + chopped veg in the fridge; assemble over 2 days.

title: Baked Chicken Tortillas

ingredients.item: Smoked paprika, oregano, onion powder, salt

steps: Season chicken pieces (smoked paprika, oregano, a little onion powder, salt) and brown in a pan.
Fill tortillas with chicken, beans, chickpeas, a little salsa and cheese. Roll up and lay in a dish.
Bake at 200°C until golden. Eat 2 days from the fridge; freeze one portion.
Serve with sour cream or yoghurt.

title: Fresh Vietnamese Rice Paper Rolls
portions: Made fresh — one batch covers a full day (lunch + dinner), keeps for the next day too
steps: Brown the chicken strips, season simply, cool.
Soak each rice paper sheet ~10 sec until pliable.
Lay noodles, lettuce, cucumber, carrot and chicken; roll tight like a burrito.
Serve with peanut sauce (recipe below). Prep the fillings ahead; roll fresh each day.

title: Chicken Fried Rice

ingredients.item: Frozen veg mix (cabbage, carrot, broccoli, cauliflower, corn, beans)

steps: Season and pan-fry the chicken on high heat until golden; set aside.
Scramble the egg in the pan, then add the frozen veg and cook through.
Add the cold cooked rice and stir-fry hot; season with soy, sesame oil, white pepper and a little onion powder.
Fold the chicken back in, portion and freeze.

title: Turkey Bolognese
portions: ~3 portions — cook once, eat 1×/week (scheduled across 2 weeks)
tip: Make it once, freeze the portions, and eat just one a week (here it's in 2 weeks; freeze any spare for a third). Vary the carb — spaghetti one week, gnocchi/pasta/polenta another — so you're never on spaghetti two days running.

ingredients.item: Carb: spaghetti / pasta / gnocchi / polenta (vary it day to day)
Ground onion 1 tsp, oregano 1 tsp, basil 1 tsp, sweet paprika ½ tsp, salt ½ tsp, pepper ¼ tsp, optional pinch sugar

steps: Heat the olive oil on medium. Add the turkey, break it apart and brown well 5–7 min (let it actually brown — kills the 'boiled' taste).
Add the ground onion + all dry spices; stir 30 sec.
Add the tomato paste and cook 1–2 min until it darkens slightly (this cuts the acidity).
Add the passata + 100 ml water, bring to a gentle simmer, then lower heat and simmer uncovered 20–25 min, stirring occasionally.

Off the heat, stir in the milk. Taste — if slightly acidic, add a tiny pinch of sugar or another splash of milk. Serve over your carb with parmesan; portion and freeze. Vary the carb so it's not spaghetti both days.

title: Chicken Burger + Fries
steps: Bake/air-fry the breaded patties at 220°C, 15–20 min (recipe below). Air-fry the fries alongside.
Toast the bun, layer: sauce, cheese, hot patty, lettuce, more sauce.
Wrap tightly in foil and let it steam a minute — that's the takeout texture.

title: Breaded Chicken Salad Bowl
portions: Same day (freeze the breaded chicken ahead)
steps: Bake the breaded chicken pieces (recipe below — make these in the same batch as the burger patties).
Build the salad: greens, tomato, cucumber, paprika, shaved parmesan.
Top with hot chicken and yoghurt sauce; serve with warm cheese bread.

title: Chinese Chicken Noodles

ingredients.item: Sugar, chicken bouillon powder, white pepper

steps: Whisk the sauce: light + dark soy, sesame oil, a little sugar, chicken bouillon, white pepper.
High heat, generous olive oil: sear the chicken, push aside, scramble the egg.
Add cabbage and carrot; stir-fry hot and fast.
Add the noodles + sauce; toss until glossy and reduced. The sesame oil + generous oil + bouillon give the rich, takeaway feel.

title: Mushroom Sauce over Pasta (vegetarian)
steps: Make a generous batch of mushroom sauce (recipe below).
Cook the carb; add the green veg if using.
Fold everything through the sauce. Eat 2 days, or freeze one.

title: Baked Spinach & Ricotta Cannelloni

ingredients.item: Cannelloni tubes (or large pasta to stuff)

steps: Make the marinara (recipe below) so you control the spices.
Mix the filling: ricotta, egg, parmesan, wilted/chopped spinach, salt and pepper.
Pipe or spoon the filling into the cannelloni tubes; lay in a baking dish.
Pour marinara over, scatter mozzarella, bake at 190°C ~30 min until bubbling and golden. Cool and freeze a portion (single-use dish reheats straight from the freezer).

title: Gnocchi in Cream Sauce (± chicken)
tip: Three meals from one base: gnocchi + cream sauce (veg) · add grilled chicken to make it heartier · or swap in the mushroom sauce. Even just cheese + gnocchi works.
steps: Cook the gnocchi. Make the cream sauce (recipe below) — or use the mushroom sauce instead for a different flavour.
Fold the gnocchi through the sauce. Want it heartier? Add grilled chicken pieces.
For the gratin: transfer to a dish, top with mozzarella, grill/bake until golden. Or skip the bake for a quick stovetop version. Eat 2 days, or freeze one.

title: Vegan Bean & Lentil Chilli

ingredients.item: Red lentils — or 200 g crumbled tofu
Smoked paprika, chili powder, oregano, onion powder, salt

steps: Soften the diced pepper and carrot in oil.
Add smoked paprika, chili and onion powder 30 sec, then tomatoes, paste, beans, corn and the red lentils.
Add the stock/water and simmer 20–25 min until the lentils are soft and it's thick (top up with water if needed). Season with salt and a splash of soy.
Portion over rice; eat one, freeze two. (Crumbled tofu instead of lentils also works — add it with the beans.)

title: Overnight Oats — Base + Mix-ins
steps: Base: stir oats + milk + cinnamon + honey in a jar, lid on, fridge overnight. Eat cold.

Then pick mix-ins from whatever you have — grated apple, mashed or sliced banana, frozen blueberries (they thaw overnight), cocoa powder, chia seeds (for a thicker pudding), peanut butter, a handful of nuts.
Combos that work: apple + cinnamon · banana + cocoa · blueberry + chia · peanut butter + banana.
Make 3–5 jars at once — they keep 3–4 days.

title: Banana & Oat Muffins

ingredients.item: Mix-ins: nuts, fruit, dark chocolate, cinnamon

steps: Heat oven to 180°C.
Mash bananas, mix with eggs (and quark if using), then oats and baking powder to a thick batter (blend half the oats for a finer texture).
Fold in whatever mix-ins you have — chopped nuts, berries, dark chocolate, a little cinnamon.
Spoon into a muffin tin, bake ~20 min until set. Cool and freeze in pairs.
tip: Add 150 g quark (and a scoop of protein powder if you like) for the higher-protein 'banana-oat-quark' version.

title: Protein Pancakes + Toppings

ingredients.item: Protein powder or protein batter pancake mix

steps: Blend to a batter.
Cook small pancakes in a non-stick pan.
Stack and top with granola, fruit, a spread.

title: Baked Oven Pancake

ingredients.item: Sugar/sweetener; baking powder; coconut oil or butter

steps: Heat oven to 180°C. Whisk milk, oil, egg, sugar; add flour + baking powder to a smooth batter.
Grease a tray, pour the batter, scatter chocolate and fruit on top.
Bake 20–30 min. Cool, cut into portions and freeze.

title: Mushroom Sauce (creamy)
steps: Sauté the mushrooms in butter/oil until golden and the water has cooked off.
Lower the heat, pour in the cooking cream.
Melt in the mozzarella and parmesan; simmer to a glossy sauce.
Season with onion powder, thyme, salt and pepper.

title: Cream Sauce
steps: Warm the cream gently.
Melt in the cream cheese wedge, parmesan and mozzarella.
Loosen with a splash of starchy pasta/gnocchi water until silky; season.

title: Marinara Sauce (no-cook)

ingredients.item: Oregano, basil, onion powder, pinch sugar, salt, pepper

steps: Stir everything together: passata/tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, basil, a little onion powder, a pinch of sugar, salt and pepper.
No need to cook it — it bakes through in the cannelloni or pizza. Taste and adjust the spices.

title: 2-Ingredient Dough (cheese bread / mini pizza)

ingredients.item: Self-rising flour (or plain + baking powder + salt)

steps: Mix yoghurt + flour to a soft dough.
Shape: flatbread, mini pizza, cheese sticks or herb strips.
Top with cheese, brush with oil, scatter herbs.
Oven 220°C, 10–14 min (or air fryer 190°C, 6–9 min). Bake first, then freeze.

title: Breaded Chicken (patties + pieces, one batch)

ingredients.item: Paprika, oregano, onion powder, salt, pepper

steps: Season chicken (paprika, oregano, a little onion powder, salt, pepper). Dip in egg, then breadcrumbs.
Make patties (for burgers) and pieces (for the salad bowl) in the same go.
Oven/air-fry 220°C, 15–20 min until golden.
Cool fully, freeze flat on a tray, then bag up.

title: Bacon Cheese Burger Sauce

ingredients.item: Smoked paprika, onion powder, black pepper

steps: Gently melt the cheese slice and stir it into the mayo while warm.
Beat in smoked paprika, onion powder and pepper.
Add a single drop of liquid smoke — that's the takeout flavour. Cool slightly before building the burger.

title: Yoghurt Salad Sauce

ingredients.item: Dried dill, onion powder, salt, pepper

steps: Whisk yoghurt with dill, a little onion powder, salt and pepper.
Loosen with lemon (and a splash of milk) to a pourable sauce. Chill until needed.

title: Peanut Sauce
steps: Whisk peanut butter, soy, lime/vinegar, honey and sesame oil.
Loosen with warm water a teaspoon at a time until it coats a spoon. Use maple instead of honey to keep it vegan.

title: Snack & Quick-Bite Ideas

ingredients.item: Plain sandwich / protein spread on bread

steps: Go-to snacks and light dinners — keep them stocked, no plan needed. Grab whatever fits the craving.
